summary: PR-UM5 Soft Quota Warnings & Upgrade CTAs - Complete Testing Pass. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Verified: (1) Cookie-compat login with agent@acenta.test/agent123, (2) GET /api/auth/me returns tenant_id, (3) GET /api/tenant/usage-summary returns Trial plan with warning/critical/limit_reached states matching spec, (4) CTA label 'Planları Görüntüle' and target '/pricing' correctly configured, (5) Trial recommendation shows 'Trial kullanımınız devam ediyor.' with 'Pro Plan' recommendation, (6) Dashboard usage card and Usage page both show warning states + CTAs, (7) Trend chart present on /app/usage, (8) CTA click navigates to /pricing page.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: test_login_returns_200 - Login with agent@acenta.test/agent123 succeeds
✅ Backend: test_login_returns_tenant_id - Login response includes tenant_id
✅ Backend: test_auth_me_returns_200 - /api/auth/me returns 200
✅ Backend: test_auth_me_returns_tenant_id - /api/auth/me includes tenant_id for frontend bootstrap
✅ Backend: test_auth_me_returns_user_info - /api/auth/me returns email and roles
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_returns_200 - /api/tenant/usage-summary returns 200
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_returns_trial_plan - Demo tenant has Trial plan
✅ Backend: test_usage_summary_has_metrics_with_warning_levels - Each metric has warning_level
✅ Backend: test_reservation_created_warning_state - 70/100 = 'warning' level (70%)
✅ Backend: test_report_generated_critical_state - 17/20 = 'critical' level (85%)
✅ Backend: test_export_generated_limit_reached_state - 10/10 = 'limit_reached' level (100%)
✅ Backend: test_cta_target_is_pricing - CTA href = /pricing
✅ Backend: test_cta_label_is_turkish - CTA label = 'Planları Görüntüle'
✅ Backend: test_trial_conversion_is_present - trial_conversion payload in response
✅ Backend: test_trial_conversion_shows_for_trial_tenant - show=True for trial tenant
✅ Backend: test_trial_message_is_correct - Message = 'Trial kullanımınız devam ediyor.'
✅ Backend: test_recommended_plan_is_pro - 70% usage recommends 'Pro' plan
✅ Backend: test_trial_conversion_cta - CTA href=/pricing, label='Planları Görüntüle'
✅ Backend: test_trend_data_present - 30-day trend data in response
✅ Frontend: Login flow works with agent@acenta.test/agent123
✅ Frontend: Dashboard quota warning banners with correct colors (amber/orange/red)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard usage card shows 3 metrics with warning badges
✅ Frontend: RESERVATIONS 70/100 shows 'Yaklaşıyor' badge (warning)
✅ Frontend: REPORTS 17/20 shows 'Kritik' badge (critical) + CTA
✅ Frontend: EXPORTS 10/10 shows 'Limit doldu' badge (limit_reached) + CTA
✅ Frontend: Trial recommendation block shows 'Pro Plan' recommendation
✅ Frontend: Trial message 'Trial kullanımınız devam ediyor.' displayed
✅ Frontend: Usage page /app/usage shows all metric cards + CTAs
✅ Frontend: Usage page trend chart 'Son 30 gün' present
✅ Frontend: CTA 'Planları Görüntüle' navigates to /pricing page
critical_code_review_comments: quota_warning_service.py: recommend_plan() correctly returns Pro for 40-80% usage ratio
quota_warning_service.py: CTA label and href correctly set to Turkish and /pricing
usage_read_service.py: build_metric_warning_payload() and build_trial_conversion_payload() properly integrated
DashboardUsageSummaryCard.jsx: Shows CTAs via UsageMetricTiles showCta prop
UsagePage.jsx: Shows CTAs + trial recommendation + trend chart
WARNING_LEVEL_META in lib/usage.js: Correct color mapping (amber=warning, orange=critical, red=limit_reached)
seed_data_creation: Demo tenant configured with reservation.created=70/100, report.generated=17/20, export.generated=10/10
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-UM5 soft quota warnings and upgrade CTAs fully verified. Demo tenant (agent@acenta.test) shows: (1) Warning banners with correct colors in app shell, (2) Dashboard usage card with 3 metrics and warning badges + CTAs for critical/limit_reached, (3) Trial recommendation block showing 'Trial kullanımınız devam ediyor.' and 'Pro Plan' recommendation, (4) Usage page with same features + trend chart. CTA 'Planları Görüntüle' correctly navigates to /pricing. Known issue: /app/partners returns 500 (unrelated to PR-UM5).
